# Website Copy
*For landing page + about + pricing + FAQ pages*

## [HERO — Above the fold]

**Headline:** Turn Your Listings Into Showings.
**Subhead:** Listing copy that reads like a human top agent wrote it — generated by AI, approved by top producers. Get your next listing live in 90 minutes.
**CTA:** Start My Unlimited Subscription — $499/mo

---

## [Headline blocks / proof]

### "We write the description that stops the scroll."
Buyers spend 8 seconds deciding whether to save or skip a listing. Your copy determines what happens next.

### "The only thing faster than our delivery is the time you get back."
Spent 92 minutes on your last listing description? Your competitors spent 12.

---

## [How it works]

1. **Send specs.** Property type, neighborhood, key features, voice, plus any mandatory disclosures.
2. **We write back.** You get MLS-ready, platform-optimized copy by end of business — same day if ordered before 2pm.
3. **List.** One click to populate your MLS, Zillow, Instagram caption, and email teaser. Go live with confidence.

---

## [Voice samples]

**Luxury / Lake Forest**
> *"Six bedrooms, each appointed as its own private retreat. The primary suite spans the full lakefront exposure — wake to heron flight and fog lifting off the water before a single appliance hums. A summer kitchen, dock-sited and gas-plumbed, turns every evening into a reason to stay home."*

**Family / Suburban Midwest**
> *"The great room connects to a kitchen island built for homework plates and game-night trash talk. The backyard backs to a trail — not a neighbor — so the dog can race ahead and the kids can still hear you call them home for dinner."*

**Investor / Duplex**
> *"Both sides leased at market. Section 8 voucher on unit B expires 18 months out, providing near-term cash flow stability. Utilities separated at panel. CapEx deferred: HVAC 2021, roof 2022, water heater 2023."*

---

## [FAQ]

**Q: Is this compliant?**
A: Every output runs through a Fair Housing + state-disclosure pre-flight. You remain the responsible party; we provide the tool-check.

**Q: My brokerage has its own brand voice / disclaimer language.**
A: We load your exact boilerplate and tone into the subscription profile on day one.

**Q: I need 3 listings this week.**
A: Unlimited subscription gives you same-day on all three. À la carte rush is $79/listing and live in 90 minutes.

**Q: Can I cancel?**
A: Monthly subscriptions cancel anytime. No annual commitment required.

---

## [About / founder note]

I spent 6 years in real estate marketing before building this. I watched agents skip lunch to rewrite listing copy and still miss the feature that closes the deal. This is fast because the machinery should be fast — you should spend your time on buyers and sellers, not on thesaurus battles.
